texto: ... don’t confuse between self-love and narcissism. Self- love is making yourself your number one priority but narcissism is start enforcing that priority over others. First one is healthy
autor: second one is not. First one is for your mental healthiness and well-being while the second one is to mess up with other peoples’ peace of mind to serve your own needs.
explicacao: Citação de second one is not. First one is for your mental healthiness and well-being while the second one is to mess up with other peoples’ peace of mind to serve your own needs. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “... don’t confuse between self-love and narcissism. Self- love is making yourself your number one…” articula reflexao, gracia-hunter, narcissism em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
